title: calibrate verb
manager: `calibrate` closes the loop — correct the model's weights and bindings from production data, emitted as a reviewable diff you approve, never a silent change. When drift detection shows the model has gone stale, calibrate proposes the correction; because it arrives as a diff, a human sees exactly what production taught the model before it is re-proven against the updated numbers.
cs: `calibrate` emits weight/binding corrections as a reviewable diff, never silent; closes the drift loop (W9.7); the corrected model is re-proven.
